forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code.

otp.title: Verify your identity
otp.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to continue.

toast.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a verification code shortly.
toast.forgotPasswordError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toast.resetPasswordSuccess: Password has been reset successfully. Please sign in.
toast.resetPasswordError: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
toast.otpSent: Verification code sent to your email.
toast.otpInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
